description: miguel76.github.io is a personal GitHub Pages site for Miguel Ceriani and hosts information about his work plus a SparqlBlocks web demo. The pages reviewed do not document any programmatic integration surface served from this domain.
summary: No public developer integration surfaces found for miguel76.github.io; the site appears to be a personal GitHub Pages site with a browser-based demo, not a documented API, GraphQL endpoint, MCP server, or CLI on this domain.
